message:
Fix critical bugs in graph visualization

Bug fixes:
- renderConnectorDown: Fixed UTF-8 string slicing - was slicing by bytes
  instead of runes, causing corrupted output with box-drawing characters
- PageDown: Added empty array guard to prevent selectedIdx becoming -1
- smartTruncateID: Fixed byte/rune confusion - now properly handles
  multi-byte characters throughout the function
- Separator height: Added guard against negative height causing panic
  in strings.Repeat
- egoWidth: Added bounds check to prevent ego box exceeding available
  terminal width on narrow displays

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
